overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a gothic common room featuring a large eagle mural and ornate celestial ceiling. The camera begins at room level showing robed characters conversing by lamplight, then slowly tilts upward to reveal intricate golden astrological patterns on the vaulted ceiling.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a gothic common room with a massive eagle mural dominating the back wall between two tall stained glass windows. Warm lamplight illuminates several characters in dark robes seated on antique furniture. At approximately 6.5 seconds, one character stands up from the center sofa and walks away, while the camera remains stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted ceiling with celestial golden patterns

events.description: camera begins slow upward tilt from room level toward the ceiling

agents.ego_description: camera tilting upward to reveal ornate ceiling architecture

entered.detail: dark vaulted ceiling with intricate golden astrological and celestial patterns between wooden arches

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward from the room level, causing the furniture and characters to exit the frame. The eagle mural moves to the bottom of the view as the ornate vaulted ceiling comes into full view, revealing intricate golden celestial patterns and wooden archways against a dark background. The stained glass windows move to the lower edges of the frame as the camera focuses entirely on the ceiling architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an intimate gathering in a gothic common room to a sweeping reveal of a celestial vaulted ceiling. It begins at room level, where warm lamplight illuminates characters in dark robes seated among antique furniture before a massive eagle mural and tall stained glass windows. As one character stands and walks away, the camera begins a slow upward tilt, causing the furniture and figures to slide out of the frame. The eagle mural then shifts toward the bottom of the view as the scene opens up to reveal intricate golden astrological patterns and wooden archways set against a dark background. Finally, the stained glass windows move to the lower edges of the frame as the camera focuses entirely on the ornate architecture of the ceiling.
